professional_summary: Dr. Sarika Chaudhry Solanki, a seasoned dentist with an MD in Dental Lasers from Vienna University, Austria, leads the Dental Care department at Venkateshwar Hospital in Dwarka, Delhi. She is renowned for her expertise in laser dentistry, providing minimally invasive and precise treatments with rapid healing times. Her compassionate approach and innovative use of advanced technology ensure patient comfort and satisfaction, making her a sought-after professional in the field of dental care.
